## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass where applicable (`pnpm test:e2e`)
- [ ] Lighthouse mobile ≥ 95 on touched pages (if user-facing)
- [ ] axe-core: 0 violations on touched pages (if user-facing)
- [ ] `pnpm build:cf` runs to completion
- [ ] PROJECT_BRIEF.md updated if sprint status changed
- [ ] New significant decisions captured as an ADR
